facebook.caption: This place fixes burnout. Tiên Sơn Đỉnh sits above Phu Quoc at 4.8 stars across 416 reviews, and the moment you reach the top, you understand why. No crowds pushing you toward a gift shop. No DJ set drowning out the view. Just elevation, wind, and silence. If you've been doing the beach-resort loop and something feels off, come here first. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the clouds move below you at Tiên Sơn Đỉnh. 416 people gave this 4.8 stars and most of them probably didn't say a word when they got to the top. Neither will you.

items.placeName: The Home Pizza Tran Hung Dao

facebook.caption:
7,215 reviews. 4.8 stars. For a pizza place in Phu Quoc.

The Home Pizza Trần Hưng Đạo on 129 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo isn't playing around. $15-30 a head, wood-fired crust, and a crowd every single night. This is the kind of spot that earns its rating one table at a time.

Go hungry. Go early. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.

items.placeName: Phu Quoc Street Food Tour - Eat with Locals, Drink with Locals

facebook.caption:

The Phu Quoc Street Food Tour at 94 Nguyễn Trung Trực does exactly that. Eat what locals eat. Drink what locals drink. No menu confusion, no tourist markup, no solo wandering past the good stuff.

5.0 stars across 97 reviews. That's a perfect score. On a street food tour.
